title: GOOD: URL scheme validation at CLI boundary
description: In main.rs, both the relay URL and the lightwalletd URL are scheme-checked before any deeper code sees them. This is the right place: CLI entry is where all user-provided inputs converge, and producing a clear error with remediation advice is trivial there. Pushing this into wallet or transport code would require threading error context back up, and missing it means a confusing gRPC or WebSocket error that says nothing about the actual problem.
close_reason: Review finding acknowledged — existing implementation is correct, no change needed
